```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

// --- Mosaic vgplot + DuckDB-WASM init (shared across paper chapters) ---
import { vg, safeLoadParquetTable } from "../_ojs/mosaic-setup.js"

async function loadTable(name, attachment) {
  const url = await attachment.url();
  return safeLoadParquetTable(name, url);
}

// --- Declarative JSON spec renderer (Tier A figures) ---
import { renderSpec } from "../_ojs/mosaic-renderer.js"
```
